text: "Angels"... Elim, Hebrew: which signifies here, the mighty, the most valiant, shall fear this monstrous fish, and in their fear shall seek to be purified.
"Under him"... He shall not value the beams of the sun; and gold to him shall be like mire.
"The deep as growing old"... Growing hoary, as it were with the froth which he leaves behind him.
"He is king"... He is superior in strength to all that are great and strong amongst living creatures: mystically it is understood of the devil, who is king over all the proud.
